name: Shapes & Patterns
description: Visual reasoning puzzles about shapes, patterns and sequences. No images needed — described in words.

stations.title: Sides
stations.questionText: How many sides does a hexagon have?

stations.title: Next in line
stations.questionText: A sequence goes: circle, square, circle, square, circle... what comes next?

stations.title: Count corners
stations.questionText: How many corners (vertices) does a cube have?

stations.title: Odd one out
stations.questionText: Triangle, square, pentagon, circle — which shape has NO straight sides?

stations.title: Fold it
stations.questionText: If you fold a square exactly in half corner-to-corner, what shape do you get?

stations.title: Angles
stations.questionText: How many degrees are in a right angle?

stations.title: Symmetry
stations.questionText: How many lines of symmetry does a perfect square have?

stations.title: Mirror
stations.questionText: Which letter looks the same in a mirror: E, F, or A?

stations.title: Build it
stations.questionText: How many faces does a cube have?
